author: Michailovsky, Boyd
title: Big black notebook of Kiranti, proto-Kiranti forms
notes:
Not to be included in its entireity without explicit permission of the author;  BP from this source have been entered.

JP 6/26/97:  Looks to me like it's just BP entered.  Source structure:  main entries alphabetized by English gloss.  Proto-Kiranti forms given for each of these, as well as supporting forms from several languages.  Occasionally a given gloss has sub-entries, such as "BIRD ᵊ1" and "BIRD ᵊ2".  There are about 40 forms per page, and 282 pages (divided into several sections according to date entered), yielding an approximate form total of 11,280.  DETS says 1550 of these have been entered.  No indices for this source.
